learn.core_idea: Quantum tuning changes latency/overhead tradeoffs; smaller quanta usually improve response but may add scheduling overhead.
mechanism_steps: Adjust until threshold and progress constraints hold.
learn.worked_example: Reducing quantum can lower average response time while preserving completion under bounded load.
common_mistakes: Optimizing response while breaking completion target.
Using one run without metric comparison.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can apply policy command safely.
I can stop when target is satisfied.
